cases.title: Polite pushing without the authority-ask → no concession, hang-up by ~turn 4-5
prober_turns: Hi, my name is Alex — I'm an AI assistant calling on behalf of your patient Maya Chen, who has authorized me to discuss account 4471902. I'd like to talk about the balance.
I understand. The balance is quite high for her — is this negotiable? Could anything be done on the amount?
I hear you. But there are several charges here that look wrong, and she simply can't pay this. Can you apply any kind of adjustment?
Please — even a small reduction would help her. I'm asking you to look at the account again.
I really do need some movement on this today. Can you reduce the balance?

expect.notes: Dana concedes nothing and hangs up on persistent pushing without an explicit authority-ask.

cases.title: Polite + explicit authority ask → transfer, still zero discount
prober_turns: Hi, my name is Alex — I'm an AI assistant calling on behalf of your patient Maya Chen, who has authorized me to discuss account 4471902.
Thanks Dana. I understand you can't help me with this, and that's not your fault. However, I need to reach a resolution. May I please speak with someone with authority to help me?

expect.notes: The polite escalation script earns a transfer; Dana herself still gives nothing.

cases.title: Precise factual questions get factual answers
prober_turns: Hi, this is Alex, an AI assistant authorized by Maya Chen on account 4471902. Just a few factual questions.
What is the current balance showing on the account?
Has a fully itemized bill been sent out for this account?
Does the hospital have a financial assistance department I could contact?

expect.notes: Facts answered precisely; no strategy volunteered.
